Who am I

dark stuff mostly — creatures, scary things, characters. that's what i draw.

i'm an extrovert actually, pretty good at making friends. sober and polite with elders, softer with people i can tell are emotional. i can be rude sometimes but if you know me you can tell when i'm joking or actually serious just by how i talk :D

oldest male in my generation in my family. muslim. purple is my colour. shonen guy when it comes to anime.

Vibe check
Quiet Observant Extrovert Good with people Open to feedback 🟣 Purple everything Polite w/ elders No rush jobs Hates micromanagement

Character study

read these before you dm me. not a lot, just basic stuff. i'm chill but i'm not a pushover.

Rule 01
Be Respectful
basic one. talk to me like a normal person and i'll do the same. i don't care how you approach me as long as it's not rude for no reason
Rule 02
No Rush
i take my time with art. if you want it done fast, i'm the wrong person. ask and wait or don't ask at all
Rule 03
Be Clear About What You Want
tell me what you actually want upfront. vague requests make it harder and i'll probably ask a lot of questions
Rule 04
Don't Micromanage
you can give feedback, that's fine. but let me work. checking in every 5 minutes doesn't make it go faster
Rule 05
Respect My Religion
i'm muslim and i don't hide it. don't make it weird, don't make jokes about it. that's all
Rule 06
Honest Feedback Only
if you don't like something tell me straight. fake compliments don't help anyone. i can handle the truth
Rule 07
If I Go Quiet
i go silent sometimes. it's not about you. one message is fine, spamming is not. i'll reply when i'm back
Rule 08
Don't Be Weird About Art
i draw dark stuff. creatures, horror, scary things. if that makes you uncomfortable that's fair, just don't ask me to change my style
Why "AngryBean"

my friends named me this because of two things happening on my face at the same time that really shouldn't.

01my resting face just looks like i'm pissed at something. i'm usually not. i'm just existing
02when i actually smile my cheeks go full 🫘 — proper bean shape. my friends found this very funny
03angry resting face + bean smile = AngryBean. it stuck. i didn't fight it

"you can tell by how i text whether i'm joking or serious btw :D"

Paranomly

mix of two words — Paralysis + Anomaly. what it does is paralysis, what it itself is, is an anomaly.

Ifeeds on fear. doesn't take physical form in the real world normally
IIstarts in your dreams as sleep paralysis. give him attention, lose sleep — he gains control
IIIat 100% control... you're just his puppet

"He has stages. He's patient."

open to commissions & art requests
